## HttpMethod type

Supported `uWebSockets.js` HTTP route methods.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type HttpMethod =
  | 'get'
  | 'post'
  | 'options'
  | 'del'
  | 'patch'
  | 'put'
  | 'head'
  | 'connect'
  | 'trace'
  | 'any';
```
